summary: Iteration-3 testing of TagIT SSR finder + Auth/Settings/TagEdit refactors. 56/58 backend tests pass (2 skipped due to environment limits — see notes). All 14 reviewer scenarios verified. SSR finder page (NEW) is fully functional: vehicle/medical/unclaimed/not-found variants all render correct HTML with expected data-testids, Hindi switching works, gzipped payload is well under 10 KB and contains no React bundle reference. Action POST stores messages and surfaces in admin /api/inbox; honeypot field silently drops spam; 30s scan-dedupe is now implemented inside finder_ssr.py and verified empirically. QR PNG + PDF captions are correctly updated to /api/finder/{slug}. SPA /tag/{slug} successfully redirects to /api/finder/{slug} and renders SSR brand. Refactored Auth/Settings/TagEdit all render and preserve all data-testids; display-name save persists; delete dialogs open; all toggles function. Admin login + 3 demo tags + /api/health + /api/inbox sanity all green.
critical_code_review_comments: routes/finder_ssr.py: clean, single-file SSR renderer ~530 lines. Properly escapes user-controlled fields (display_name, message, finder_*) via html.escape with quote=True. Honeypot returns the same thanks HTML as the success path — bot-indistinguishable. Good.
routes/finder_ssr.py:418 — db.tags.find_one excludes _id via projection {_id:0}. Good practice.

routes/finder_ssr.py: scan-dedupe within 30s is now correctly implemented here AND iteration-2's gap in routes/tag_routes.py: the /api/public/tags/{slug} JSON endpoint is no longer the primary path so dedupe priority shifts to the SSR route — verified working.
routes/finder_ssr.py:393 _sanitize is a basic regex strip, not full HTML sanitization; acceptable since the output is then html.escape'd. Defense-in-depth pattern.
Geolocation script is inline & ~600B, gracefully degrades with the .js / .no-js / .js-only CSS guards. No external JS bundle — confirmed no /static/js/main.* in HTML. Page works fully without JS.
routes/tag_routes.py:130 + routes/pdf_routes.py:71,136,186 — all QR / PDF URLs now point to /api/finder/{slug}. Visually confirmed in the dashboard QR caption screenshot.

Settings refactor: data-testids are settings-displayname, notify-message-switch, notify-scan-switch, settings-lang-trigger, export-data-btn, delete-account-btn (NOT the suggested settings-profile-section / settings-notifications-section naming in the review request). The test-ids are preserved from iteration_2 so existing regression tests still pass — naming difference is informational only.

TagEdit refactor: data-testids tag-displayname-input / tag-label-input / tag-message-input / tag-save-btn / delete-tag-btn all preserved. Components extracted to /components/tag-edit/TagSections.jsx (TagBasicSection + TagDataSection + TagPublicFieldsSection).

Auth refactor: all four reviewer-listed test-ids (login-email-input, login-password-input, login-submit-button, google-login-btn) preserved. AuthParts.jsx isolates GoogleAuthButton + AuthVisualPanel + EmailPasswordForm cleanly.

success_rate.backend: 100% executed (56/56 passed; 2 skipped — unclaimed test cannot create via public API, QR-decode test skipped because pyzbar isn't installed. Both scenarios verified out-of-band via direct DB insert and source-code inspection respectively.)
success_rate.frontend: 100% on covered flows (auth, dashboard, settings sections, tag edit save+delete dialog, /tags/new, SPA redirect → SSR)

seed_data_creation: Temporary unclaimed tag (slug=unclaimed-test-11cd09) was inserted into db.tags via Motor to verify SSR unclaimed view, then deleted. No persistent test data left.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration-3 scope is green. The SSR finder page lives at GET /api/finder/{slug} and POST /api/finder/{slug}/action — both return HTML. Tests in /app/backend/tests/test_finder_ssr.py cover: vehicle (English+Hindi+gzip size), medical emergency view (O+ blood, tel: link, emergency-call-btn), 404, action submission inbox round-trip, honeypot, and scan-dedupe within 30s. The /tag/{slug} SPA route now redirects via window.location.replace to /api/finder/{slug} (FinderRedirect.jsx); /pages/Finder.jsx was removed. If you need to re-verify the unclaimed flow without DB access, no public API supports creating an unclaimed tag — you must insert directly into db.tags with owner_id=null (see /app/test_reports/iteration_3.json seed_data_creation for the exact doc shape).
rca of the issue: No issues to RCA. Previous iteration-2 missing scan-dedupe was addressed inside the new finder_ssr.py (lines 422-444), and the dedupe behaviour was empirically verified — 5 rapid scans within 30s increment scan_count by ≤ 1.
